targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "is_anomaly")
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tags_error")
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "is_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)

panels.title: Trend Rate by Tag (change per hour)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_trend")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rate_per_hour")

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
